text: The user has approved the Kickoff Protocol for the "System-Enforced Guardrails" Epic. Please checkout a new isolated feature branch named `epic/system-guardrails`. Ensure `main` is clean, up-to-date, and free of uncommitted changes before branching. Report back when the branch is created and ready for the backend architect.

**Initiating Branch Creation**

I've decided to carve out a fresh feature branch, `epic/system-guardrails`, as a clean starting point. My initial focus is making sure `main` is pristine – no lingering uncommitted changes or outdated commits. I'll be using Git Workflow Master mode to handle the branch setup, so now I need to actually execute the necessary commands.
